# Check if the applicant meets the minimum age requirement
        if self.age < 30:
            return False
        
        # Check if the applicant has sufficient years of experience
        if self.years_of_experience < 10:
            return False
        
        # Check if the applicant has at least a bachelor's degree

            return False
        
        # Check if the applicant is currently employed
        if self.employment_status != 'employed':
            return False
        
        # All conditions satisfied
